--- grant_usage_on_schema_default.sql
GRANT USAGE ON SCHEMA DEFAULT TO ROLE r

--- AST
&ast.Grant{
  Privilege: &ast.UsagePrivilegeOnSchema{
    Usage:   6,
    Default: 22,
  },
  Roles: []*ast.Ident{
    &ast.Ident{
      NamePos: 38,
      NameEnd: 39,
      Name:    "r",
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
GRANT USAGE ON SCHEMA DEFAULT TO ROLE r
